name: donut-text
description: Donut chart with centered text displaying total value and label

data.name: data
data.description: Array of data items for the donut slices. Example: [{value: 100, name: 'Category 1'}, {value: 200, name: 'Category 2'}]

radius.name: radius
radius.description: Inner and outer radius [innerRadius, outerRadius]. Example: ['40%', '70%']

centerText.name: centerText
centerText.description: Main text to display in the center. Example: 'Total'

centerSubtext.name: centerSubtext
centerSubtext.description: Subtitle text below the main center text. Example: '1000'

centerTextFontSize.name: centerTextFontSize
centerTextFontSize.description: Font size for the center main text. Example: 24

centerSubtextFontSize.name: centerSubtextFontSize
centerSubtextFontSize.description: Font size for the center subtitle. Example: 16

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}
